message:
feat(ufunc): support ND np.inner parity (franken_numpy-c5ln)

Extend UFuncArray::inner to handle ND arrays like NumPy:
- For 1-D arrays: regular inner product (unchanged)
- For ND arrays: sum over last axis of both inputs
- Result shape: a.shape[:-1] + b.shape[:-1]
- Scalar inputs: element-wise multiply

Add 5 new unit tests: 2D×2D, 2D×1D, 3D×2D, dimension mismatch, scalar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
